title: dryopteris leucolepis
intro: Dryopteris leucolepis, also known as the silverback fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. It is native to China and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Dryopteris leucolepis is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its health benefits, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being.
